login.subheadline: Manage, automate, and optimize your Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns — all in one place.
login.feature1Desc: Track spend, results, CTR, and CPA across all your campaigns in one view.
login.feature2Desc: Set rules that automatically pause, adjust, or scale your ads based on performance.
login.feature3Desc: Ask questions about your campaigns and get instant, data-driven insights.
